title: Senior Software Engineer - BigBasket - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - BigBasket - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Join the BigBasket family as a Senior Software Engineer in Nashik. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BigBasket:
BigBasket is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket!
